feedback.issue: The toggle button's focus indicator is `focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-indigo-600`, which deviates from ui-style-guide.md §Accessibility baseline ('visible focus ring (`focus-visible:ring-2 ring-indigo-600`)') and §Buttons. Every other interactive element in the app uses the ring pattern (e.g. sign-in button uses `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-600`; all form inputs use `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-600`). A focus indicator IS present so this is not an a11y regression, but it breaks the guide's stated focus convention and app-wide consistency. Change to `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-600` (with `focus:outline-none`/`focus-visible:ring-inset` as used elsewhere) to match.
